text: A man is standing on top of a snow covered hill.
A clock tower with windows against the sky
A commuter train with five cars riding on train tracks.
A woman that is drinking out a cup.
A person snowboards in front of snow covered evergreen trees.
Bunches of very ripe bananas sit on a vendor's table.
A kitten sits on the floor in front of a water bowl
Clock on a pillar at the start of a long hallway.
A man in a suit and tie standing next to a woman.
A person in a red suit snowboarding down a hill.
